metadata.title: Dr. Alondra Robles - Private Dental Practice
metadata.description: Private dental clinic of Dr. Alondra Robles. Cosmetic dentistry, implants, orthodontics and more. Book your appointment today.

hero.subtitle: Dr. Alondra Robles provides personalized excellence in dental care in a warm and professional environment. Your oral health in the best hands.

about.label: (About me)
about.title: Experience and Warmth in Every Visit
about.description: Dr. Alondra Robles has over 15 years of experience in aesthetic and restorative dentistry. Her personalized approach and use of cutting-edge technology guarantee exceptional results and satisfied patients.

services.title: Our Dental Services
services.description: Dr. Alondra Robles offers a wide range of dental treatments using state-of-the-art technology to ensure your comfort and the best results.

cavityProtection.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
cavityProtection.description: Teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, and smile design. Transform your image with personalized treatments tailored to your needs.

rootCanal.title: Endodontics
rootCanal.description: Root canal treatments with advanced technology and minimal invasion. We save your natural teeth with painless procedures.

oralSurgery.title: Dental Implants
oralSurgery.description: Recover your smile with state-of-the-art implants. Implant placement with quality guarantee and lasting results.

works.label: (our work)
works.title: Real Transformations
works.description: Discover some of Dr. Alondra Robles' successful cases. Every smile is unique and deserves specialized care.

consultation.label: (first consultation)
consultation.title: First Consultation with X-rays included
consultation.description: Investment in your dental health with personalized care. Includes digital x-rays needed for your complete diagnosis.
consultation.detailedDescription: On your first visit Dr. Alondra Robles performs a complete diagnosis with digital x-rays, periodontal evaluation and a personalized treatment plan. Your dental health is my priority.

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.description: Discover why thousands of patients trust Dr. Alondra Robles with the care of their smile.

location.label: (find us)
location.title: Visit Our Clinic
location.description: Private practice located in an accessible area with parking available. Schedule your appointment and visit to experience the best personalized dental care.

metadata.title: Professional Teeth Whitening | Dr. Alondra Robles
metadata.description: Transform your smile with our professional teeth whitening. Up to 4 shades lighter in a single session. Book your free consultation.

hero.subtitle: Transform your smile in just 45 minutes with our professional teeth whitening. Visible results from the first session.

benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.title: Why choose our whitening?
benefits.subtitle: Cutting-edge technology combined with Dr. Alondra Robles' experience to give you the best results.
benefits.fastDesc: Just 45 minutes and you'll see immediate results. Perfect for busy people.
benefits.safeDesc: Approved procedure that does not damage tooth enamel or gums.
benefits.longLastingDesc: Results that last up to 2 years with proper care.
benefits.personalizedDesc: We adjust the intensity according to your needs and sensitivity.
benefits.guaranteedDesc: Satisfaction guaranteed or your money back.

process.label: Process
process.title: How does it work?
process.subtitle: A simple, safe and effective process in just 4 steps
process.step1Desc: Free initial evaluation of your smile and discussion of your goals.
process.step2Desc: We protect your gums and lips before applying the whitening gel.
process.step3Desc: We apply the gel and activate it with state-of-the-art LED light.
process.step4Desc: We reveal your new smile up to 4 shades lighter.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Investment in your smile
pricing.subtitle: An affordable price for a complete smile transformation

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions about teeth whitening

questions.a: No, the procedure is completely painless. Some patients may experience slight sensitivity after treatment, but this disappears within 24-48 hours.
Results can last between 1 and 2 years, depending on your habits. Avoiding coffee, tea, red wine and tobacco helps keep your smile white.

questions.q: Is it safe for tooth enamel?
questions.a: Yes, our whitening is 100% safe for enamel when performed by professionals. We use approved products and techniques that protect your enamel.

questions.q: Can I whiten if I have braces?
questions.a: Braces must be removed before whitening. Implants do not whiten, so we recommend coordinating the color with previous treatment.

questions.q: How many sessions do I need?
questions.a: Most patients achieve excellent results with just one 45-minute session. For deep stains, we might recommend a second session.
During the first 48 hours it's advisable to avoid foods and drinks that stain (coffee, tea, wine). We will provide you with a specific care kit.

finalCta.title: Ready for your new smile?
finalCta.subtitle: Book your free evaluation consultation today. Dr. Alondra Robles will evaluate your case and recommend the best treatment.
